title: Bitcoin nears $63.5K into weekly close as trader warns of 'terrible' Monday
summary: Bitcoin reached its highest levels in nearly a fortnight over the weekend, but BTC price action faced an "absolutely terrible" Monday track record.

title: South Africa proposes crypto tax guidance under existing framework
summary: South Africa’s tax authority proposed draft guidance clarifying how crypto assets are taxed under existing income and capital gains tax rules, seeking public input until Aug. 31.

title: New York Thunderstorms Raise Flood Risk as Heat Dissipates
summary: New York City will have a cooler, soggier Sunday now that the massive heat dome across the US East that taxed power grids and snarled transit has started to crack, while lingering high temperatures in Washington and across the Mid-Atlantic triggered air quality warnings.

title: EasyJet Agrees to Castlelake’s £5.2 Billion Takeover Offer
summary: EasyJet Plc has agreed in principle to a fifth takeover offer from Castlelake LP for £6.90 per share in cash, the companies said in a statement Sunday.

title: Fake Mac Clipboard App Delivers New Password-Stealing Malware
summary: A new Mac infostealer dubbed PamStealer impersonates the open-source Maccy clipboard manager to steal passwords and more.

title: Bitcoin to $53K? Exchange Deposits Jump as Analysts Warn of Increased Volatility
summary: Bitcoin bounced back above $60,000 this week, but increased volatility might be on the way as crypto deposits to exchanges spike.

title: Bitcoin ETFs log record eighth straight negative week despite large Thursday inflow
summary: Hyperliquid ETFs took in $4.3 million, their smallest week since launching in May, down from a record $111 million the week before.

title: Nearly 1 million wallets are down $3.81 billion on Trump’s memecoin: report
summary: Trump's annual financial disclosure showed a $636 million payout tied to the token and more than $1.4 billion in total crypto-related income for 2025.

title: US voters say Trump’s Iran war not worth the cost — FT poll
summary: Survey shows conflict is dragging down president’s approval ratings ahead of November midterms

title: Donald Trump defies storms and heatwave to deliver July 4 address
summary: President eulogises forebears and eviscerates enemies at Lincoln Memorial on 250th anniversary of independence
